economic_notes: Nation holds interests in 4 commercial partnerships: Station Uapishka SENC (51% - resort/lodging), Groupe Umek SEC (23.33% - snow crab), Pecheries Nikan SEC (49% - crab fishing), Les Pecheries Nitshimau SENC (50% - crab fishing). Equity method used for these partnerships. Combined partnership revenue $14,680,866, net assets $12,930,009. Nation also holds investments of $28,191,117 including special claims fund and financial strategy portfolio.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2021. Financial statements in French. Nation is Conseil des Innus de Pessamit (also known as Katakuitshet Pessamit) in Quebec. Four commercial partnerships accounted for by equity method (not consolidated): Station Uapishka, Groupe Umek, Pecheries Nikan, Les Pecheries Nitshimau. Retroactive accounting modification in 2021 reduced accumulated surplus by $34,586. Contribution par financement of $1,590,192 included in revenues relates to long-term debt subsidy from Secretariat aux affaires autochtones. Net debt position of $10,145,944. Large long-term debt portfolio of $35,882,485 secured by various mortgages on residential properties. Contaminated site liability not recorded as costs cannot be estimated. No remuneration schedule visible in extracted text. isc_funding calculated as sum of SAC contributions (Globale $24,816,588 + Préétablies et souples $4,168,231 + Fixes $16,363,079). total_government_transfers includes all government contributions. osr calculated as total revenue minus identified government transfers.
